obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_384: \E2* I couldn't hit your window a single time./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_386: \E2* You were^1, um^1, throwing dirt at us?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_451: \Eb* ..^1. sure^1, Kris^1. If you want to./%
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_479: * ..^1. Kris..^1. a couple nights ago^1, you.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_480: * You came and reassured me^1. You told me everything was a dream./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_481: * ..^1. hearing your voice then^1, it made me so happy.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_484:
* But are you sure
it was all a dream?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_485: * I'm..^1. I'm not saying I want to believe it^1. That would be terrible./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_486: * But if there was some piece..^1. just some little piece.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_487: * If some piece of that power we had was real/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_489: * Kris^1, don't turn away^1, come closer./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_490: * Explain how you knew what my dream was^1, Kris.../%
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_523: \E2* Finally hit your window with a dirt clod^1. Heh./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_526: \E9* (Well^1, THAT brought me back to reality...)/%
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_583: \E9* Sorry^1, gotta do it^1. Someone dared us to./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_624: * Yeah..^1. Ralsei told me..^1. I should ride with you^1, y'know?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_627: * He's pretty chatty^1, y'know^1. When you aren't around./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_628: * He was like^1, combing my hair this morning.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_629: * Asking me about all the rides..^1. what I was gonna eat.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_630: * Just..^1. looking so excited for me^1, I guess./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_632: * He's real^1, Kris^1. They all are./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_633: * It..^1. wouldn't make any sense if he's not./%
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_654: * Anyway^1, the hell do you do in a Ferris Wheel^1, anyway...?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_655: * ..^1. maybe we should wave to Noelle?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_657: * ..^1. let's do a pose or something./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_684: * What are you doing^1? Making a "C"...?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_685: * Sure^1, that's a cool pose^1. I'll match./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_686: * Hey Noelle^1! Look at our cool pose!/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_688: * Huh..^1. I dunno if she likes it./%
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_714: \EI* So^1, um..^1. did you two have fun^1, in the Ferris wheel?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_715: \EH* ..^1. combining your hands^1, um^1, into a heart?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_716: \EI* And^1, um^1, repeatedly pointing at it?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_718: \E6* Oh^1, damn^1, THAT'S what it was?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_725: \EM* H-huh...^1? Umm^1, well^1, I really liked it^1, then!/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_727: \E0* Woulda been cooler if the window was open and we threw stuff./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_739: * Hey^1, don't be embarrassed^1! C'mon^1, do it back!/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_767: \E6* Umm^1, did you two have fun...?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_769: \E9* Not as much fun as you were having./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_771: \ES* I..^1. I don't know what you're talking about!/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_819: \EM* I guess..^1. if you're daring us to./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_849: \E9* See ya in a minute^1, Kris!/%
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_898: * (..^1. you thought about what they might be doing...)/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_899: * (..^1. but you didn't think about it very hard.)/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_900: * (Instead^1, you wondered about the qualifications of Sans.)/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_901: * (..^1. he doesn't seem certified to run a Ferris wheel.)/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_902: * (..^1. didn't someone else run this last year?)/%

obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_916: * (Noelle^1, confused^1, holds onto your other ear^1, but doesn't pull it.)/
